summary: Backend-focused software engineer with hands-on experience building and optimizing RESTful APIs in Python. Strong background in relational databases, backend system design, and cloud-based deployments.

bullets: Designed and implemented RESTful APIs for a payments platform using Python and Flask.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries by introducing indexing and query refactoring to improve response times.
Collaborated with frontend engineers to integrate backend services into customer-facing payment workflows.
Wrote unit tests and performed code reviews to maintain clean and testable backend code.
Developed internal dashboard components using React to monitor backend service health.
Assisted in debugging and maintaining legacy backend services written in Python.
Worked closely with senior engineers to understand API design and database schema decisions.

projects.name: Personal Blog Engine
bullets: Built a backend-driven blog engine using Django with a PostgreSQL database.
Designed REST APIs to manage posts, users, and authentication.
Containerized the application with Docker and deployed it on AWS.

projects.name: Payment Processing Prototype
bullets: Implemented a prototype payment processing backend to simulate transaction workflows.
Focused on database consistency and error handling for financial operations.

job_description:
We are looking for a Backend Engineer to join our Payments team.

The ideal candidate has strong experience with Python and relational databases (PostgreSQL). You will be building high-performance APIs and optimizing data pipelines.

Knowledge of Cloud platforms like AWS is a plus.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement RESTful APIs.
- Optimize database performance.
- Write clean, testable code.
